description_long: This is a small, ornate Chinese-style pagoda with a green-tiled, upward-curving roof adorned with golden dragon ornaments and decorative finials. The structure is surrounded by lush bamboo plants and red lanterns hanging from the eaves, adding a festive and traditional touch. The roof features intricate yellow ridge decorations and a prominent dragon head at the front, while the building itself is supported by wooden pillars and has a welcoming entrance with double doors. The walls are decorated with wooden latticework and small hanging ornaments, and the base is set on a grassy, octagonal platform. A tall, slender tree with reddish leaves rises behind the pagoda, enhancing its picturesque appearance. The overall design is vibrant, with a harmonious blend of natural and architectural elements typical of East Asian garden pavilions.
description: A vibrant Chinese-style pagoda with green-tiled, upturned roofs, golden dragon ornaments, red lanterns, and lush bamboo, set on a grassy platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, dragon head ornament, red lanterns, and bamboo plants flanking the doorway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered roof, golden ridge decorations, and dense bamboo along the building's side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the tall, red-leaved tree and the back of the pagoda, with lanterns and bamboo visible.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the dragon head, entrance, lanterns, and the overall ornate roof structure.
